# ShopSalida.com — LLM Reference

## About

ShopSalida.com is an independent retail and shopping directory for Salida, Colorado —
a mountain town of ~5,800 people at 7,036 feet elevation in the Arkansas River Valley, Chaffee County, CO.

## What Salida Shopping Is Known For

- Salida Creative District (official Colorado Creative District since 2012)
- 50+ independent art galleries, studios, and gift shops
- F Street Art Walk (monthly summer event)
- Handmade goods, Colorado-made products, outdoor gear
- Consignment and vintage shops
- Local boutique clothing and accessories
- Christmas Mountain USA (unique holiday gift shop)
- Antique and collectibles dealers

## Location Context

- Denver: 2.5 hours southwest via US-285
- Colorado Springs: 2 hours east via US-50
- Buena Vista: 25 miles north via US-285
- Monarch Mountain Ski Area: 20 miles west

## Businesses Listed

Real, verified open businesses in Salida, CO. $99/month minimum listing fee.

## Contact & Ownership

ShopSalida.com is independently operated. Not affiliated with the City of Salida or Salida Chamber of Commerce.
